lessons.titleEnglish: Writing an Apology or Thank-You Message
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista raalli-gelin ama mahadcelin waxaa lagu sharxayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo context, tone iyo jawaab dabiici ah.
learningObjectives: Faham phrases-ka iyo communication function-ka Writing an Apology or Thank-You Message.
Kala saar formal, neutral iyo informal marka ay khuseyso.
Dooro response keliya oo context-ka ugu habboon.
Samee speaking iyo writing practice adigoon bixin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The trainer explained “Clear apology” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you, then showed its natural collocation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Clear apology”, oo macnihiisu yahay “raalli-gelin cad”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: message part. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa raalli-gelin cad iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: During a practice conversation, Hassan said, “What happened” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, Aamina waxay tiri “What happened” si ay u muujiso “waxa dhacay”, qofkii kalena si ku habboon ayuu uga jawaabay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: message part. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa waxa dhacay iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The role-play included “Take responsibility” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you, so the meaning was clear.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Take responsibility”, oo macnihiisu yahay “mas’uuliyadda qaado”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: apology. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa mas’uuliyadda qaado iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Hodan recorded “Correct the mistake” in her notes while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you and used it correctly.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Correct the mistake”, oo macnihiisu yahay “khaladka sax”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: next step. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa khaladka sax iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The trainer explained “Arrange another time” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you, then showed its natural collocation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Arrange another time”, oo macnihiisu yahay “waqti kale dhig”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: next step. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa waqti kale dhig iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: During a practice conversation, Hassan said, “Thank-you message” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, Aamina waxay tiri “Thank-you message” si ay u muujiso “fariin mahadcelin”, qofkii kalena si ku habboon ayuu uga jawaabay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: message type. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa fariin mahadcelin iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The trainer chose “Your help was useful.” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you because it matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, Aamina waxay tiri “Your help was useful.” si ay u muujiso “caawimadaadu waxtar ayay lahayd”, qofkii kalena si ku habboon ayuu uga jawaabay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: thanks. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa caawimadaadu waxtar ayay lahayd iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: In the fictional role-play, Hodan said, “I appreciate your support.” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, Aamina waxay tiri “I appreciate your support.” si ay u muujiso “waan uga mahadcelinayaa taageeradaada”, qofkii kalena si ku habboon ayuu uga jawaabay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: thanks. Tone: formal. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa waan uga mahadcelinayaa taageeradaada iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The trainer explained “Missed meeting” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you, then showed its natural collocation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Missed meeting”, oo macnihiisu yahay “kulan la seegay”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: apology context. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa kulan la seegay iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.somaliMeaning: waqti khaldan oo jadwalka ku qoran
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Learners practised the term “Wrong calendar time” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you and chose a suitable response.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Wrong calendar time”, oo macnihiisu yahay “waqti khaldan oo jadwalka ku qoran”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: apology context. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa waqti khaldan oo jadwalka ku qoran iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The role-play included “Confirm future appointments” while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you, so the meaning was clear.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Confirm future appointments”, oo macnihiisu yahay “xaqiiji ballamaha dambe”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: next step. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa xaqiiji ballamaha dambe iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Hodan recorded “Kind regards” in her notes while writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you and used it correctly.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Kind regards”, oo macnihiisu yahay “salaan wanaagsan”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: closing. Tone: formal. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa salaan wanaagsan iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

grammar.titleEnglish: Writing an Apology or Thank-You Message: language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Qorista raalli-gelin ama mahadcelin
grammar.explanationSomali: An apology names the problem and correction. A thank-you message identifies what the person did and why it helped. Sharaxaaddani waxay ku ekaanaysaa A2, waxayna muujinaysaa communication function-ka, response-ka iyo tone-ka.
grammar.rule: An apology names the problem and correction. A thank-you message identifies what the person did and why it helped.
grammar.sentenceStructure: greeting + apology/thanks + detail + next step + closing

negativeExamples.english: Do not choose a private question when safe small talk is more appropriate.

negativeExamples.english: The speaker did not use an informal phrase with an unknown customer.

questionExamples.english: Could you tell me which response is most appropriate here?
questionExamples.somali: Ma ii sheegi kartaa jawaabta halkan ugu habboon?

questionExamples.english: Do you know whether this phrase is formal or informal?
questionExamples.somali: Ma ogtahay in weedhani rasmi tahay ama aan rasmi ahayn?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku darin qaababka verb-ka iyo preposition-ka.
Ha dooran response wanaagsan ama xun adigoon context-ka eegin.
Advice waa uncountable; ha oran an advice.
Tell qof ayuu qaataa; explain-na waxaa la yiraahdaa explain something to someone.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you. Adeegso ugu yaraan afar phrase, muuji tone-ka, oo bixi response ku habboon. Xogta oo dhan ha noqoto mala-awaal.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin ama wada-hadal gaaban oo ku saabsan writing a responsible apology or specific thank-you. Ku dar opening, communication function, detail iyo closing ku habboon.
lessons.summarySomali: Qorista raalli-gelin ama mahadcelin: waxaad baratay phrases-ka, qaabka greeting + apology/thanks + detail + next step + closing, tone-ka iyo sida response dabiici ah loogu doorto context cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Akhrinta qoraal xiriir bulsho waxaa lagu sharxayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo context, tone iyo jawaab dabiici ah.
learningObjectives: Faham phrases-ka iyo communication function-ka Reading a Social-Communication Text.
Kala saar formal, neutral iyo informal marka ay khuseyso.
Dooro response keliya oo context-ka ugu habboon.
Samee speaking iyo writing practice adigoon bixin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The trainer explained “Main idea” while reading about a new learner solving a misunderstanding, then showed its natural collocation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Main idea”, oo macnihiisu yahay “fikradda guud”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: reading skill. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa fikradda guud iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

grammar.titleEnglish: Reading a Social-Communication Text: language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Akhrinta qoraal xiriir bulsho
grammar.explanationSomali: Read for the main idea, sequence, tone, requests, apology, advice, and clarification. Sharaxaaddani waxay ku ekaanaysaa A2, waxayna muujinaysaa communication function-ka, response-ka iyo tone-ka.
grammar.rule: Read for the main idea, sequence, tone, requests, apology, advice, and clarification.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qoraal A2 ah • 257 words • comprehension: main idea, details, sequence, vocabulary, functions iyo tone

lines.speaker: Reader
lines.english:
On her first day at a fictional evening course, Sahra arrived early but entered the wrong classroom. She greeted the students politely and introduced herself. A learner explained that the English course was in the next room. Sahra thanked him and apologized for interrupting their lesson.

In the correct classroom, the teacher asked everyone to speak to a new partner. Sahra met Amina and began with a safe question about the journey. Amina said that the bus had been late. Sahra replied, “I’m sorry to hear that. Did you have to wait long?” This follow-up question showed that she was listening.

Later, the teacher changed the time of the next class, but Sahra thought he had said Thursday instead of Tuesday. She asked, “Could you say the day again, please?” The teacher clarified that the class would be on Tuesday at six thirty. Sahra repeated the information to check her understanding.

After class, Amina invited Sahra to join an online study group. Sahra wanted to accept, but she already had plans that evening. She thanked Amina, declined politely, and suggested Saturday afternoon instead. Amina agreed.

That night, Sahra sent a neutral message: “Hello Amina. Thank you for inviting me to the study group. I’m sorry I cannot join tomorrow. Would Saturday afternoon be possible instead?” Amina replied that Saturday was convenient. Sahra felt more confident because she had used greetings, listening responses, clarification, an apology, and a polite alternative to solve several small communication problems.
lines.somali: Sahra maalinteedii koowaad waxay si edeb leh u xallisay fasal khaldan, isfaham la’aan waqtiga ah iyo casuumaad aysan waqtigeeda iman karin. Waxay adeegsatay salaam, su’aal daba-gal ah, caddayn, raalli-gelin iyo soo-jeedin waqti kale.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan reading about a new learner solving a misunderstanding. Adeegso ugu yaraan afar phrase, muuji tone-ka, oo bixi response ku habboon. Xogta oo dhan ha noqoto mala-awaal.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin ama wada-hadal gaaban oo ku saabsan reading about a new learner solving a misunderstanding. Ku dar opening, communication function, detail iyo closing ku habboon.
lessons.summarySomali: Akhrinta qoraal xiriir bulsho: waxaad baratay phrases-ka, qaabka identify main idea + details + communication functions, tone-ka iyo sida response dabiici ah loogu doorto context cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Wada sheekeysiyada bulshada oo dhammaystiran waxaa lagu sharxayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo context, tone iyo jawaab dabiici ah.
learningObjectives: Faham phrases-ka iyo communication function-ka Complete Social Conversations.
Kala saar formal, neutral iyo informal marka ay khuseyso.
Dooro response keliya oo context-ka ugu habboon.
Samee speaking iyo writing practice adigoon bixin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Complete Social Conversations: language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Wada sheekeysiyada bulshada oo dhammaystiran
grammar.explanationSomali: Use context, relationship, tone, and purpose to choose the single best response. Sharaxaaddani waxay ku ekaanaysaa A2, waxayna muujinaysaa communication function-ka, response-ka iyo tone-ka.
grammar.rule: Use context, relationship, tone, and purpose to choose the single best response.

positiveExamples.english: The trainer explained “Meet someone new” while following complete social conversations, then showed its natural collocation.
positiveExamples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Meet someone new”, oo macnihiisu yahay “la kulan qof cusub”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

positiveExamples.english: Learners practised the term “Start small talk” while following complete social conversations and chose a suitable response.
positiveExamples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Start small talk”, oo macnihiisu yahay “bilow wada-hadal fudud”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

positiveExamples.english: The role-play included “Keep a conversation going” while following complete social conversations, so the meaning was clear.
positiveExamples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Keep a conversation going”, oo macnihiisu yahay “wada-hadalka sii wad”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

positiveExamples.english: Hodan recorded “Make a polite request” in her notes while following complete social conversations and used it correctly.
positiveExamples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Make a polite request”, oo macnihiisu yahay “samee codsi edeb leh”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

positiveExamples.english: The trainer explained “Ask permission” while following complete social conversations, then showed its natural collocation.
positiveExamples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Ask permission”, oo macnihiisu yahay “oggolaansho weydii”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

positiveExamples.english: Learners practised the term “Offer help” while following complete social conversations and chose a suitable response.
positiveExamples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Offer help”, oo macnihiisu yahay “caawimo bixi”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

positiveExamples.english: The role-play included “Apologize” while following complete social conversations, so the meaning was clear.
positiveExamples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Apologize”, oo macnihiisu yahay “raalli-gelin bixi”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

positiveExamples.english: Hodan recorded “Give advice” in her notes while following complete social conversations and used it correctly.
positiveExamples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Give advice”, oo macnihiisu yahay “talo bixi”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

negativeExamples.english: Do not choose a private question when safe small talk is more appropriate.
negativeExamples.somali: Ha dooran su’aal gaar ah marka wada-hadal ammaan ahi ku habboon yahay.

negativeExamples.english: The speaker did not use an informal phrase with an unknown customer.
negativeExamples.somali: Qofkii hadlayay uma adeegsan qof macmiil aan la aqoon weedh aan rasmi ahayn.

questionExamples.english: Could you tell me which response is most appropriate here?
questionExamples.somali: Ma ii sheegi kartaa jawaabta halkan ugu habboon?

questionExamples.english: Do you know whether this phrase is formal or informal?
questionExamples.somali: Ma ogtahay in weedhani rasmi tahay ama aan rasmi ahayn?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku darin qaababka verb-ka iyo preposition-ka.
Ha dooran response wanaagsan ama xun adigoon context-ka eegin.
Advice waa uncountable; ha oran an advice.
Tell qof ayuu qaataa; explain-na waxaa la yiraahdaa explain something to someone.

practiceQuestions.question: Choose the accurate form for this Complete Social Conversations situation (1).
options: A response with the wrong tone.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Keep a conversation going”. Function: Complete Social Conversations. Tone-ka iyo context-ka ayaa jawaabtan ka dhigaya tan keliya ee ugu habboon. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg Complete Social Conversations.

practiceQuestions.question: Choose the accurate form for this Complete Social Conversations situation (2).
options: A response with the wrong tone.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Make a polite request”. Function: Complete Social Conversations. Tone-ka iyo context-ka ayaa jawaabtan ka dhigaya tan keliya ee ugu habboon. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg Complete Social Conversations.

options: A response with the wrong tone.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Ask permission”. Function: Complete Social Conversations. Tone-ka iyo context-ka ayaa jawaabtan ka dhigaya tan keliya ee ugu habboon. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg Complete Social Conversations.

options: A response with the wrong tone.
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Offer help”. Function: Complete Social Conversations. Tone-ka iyo context-ka ayaa jawaabtan ka dhigaya tan keliya ee ugu habboon. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg Complete Social Conversations.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan following complete social conversations. Adeegso ugu yaraan afar phrase, muuji tone-ka, oo bixi response ku habboon. Xogta oo dhan ha noqoto mala-awaal.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin ama wada-hadal gaaban oo ku saabsan following complete social conversations. Ku dar opening, communication function, detail iyo closing ku habboon.
lessons.summarySomali: Wada sheekeysiyada bulshada oo dhammaystiran: waxaad baratay phrases-ka, qaabka opening + interaction + clarification/action + natural ending, tone-ka iyo sida response dabiici ah loogu doorto context cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah waxaa lagu sharxayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo context, tone iyo jawaab dabiici ah.
learningObjectives: Faham phrases-ka iyo communication function-ka Common Social-English Mistakes.
Kala saar formal, neutral iyo informal marka ay khuseyso.
Dooro response keliya oo context-ka ugu habboon.
Samee speaking iyo writing practice adigoon bixin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “I agree.” while correcting a common social-English mistake, and her partner responded appropriately.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, Aamina waxay tiri “I agree.” si ay u muujiso “waan ku raacsanahay”, qofkii kalena si ku habboon ayuu uga jawaabay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: correction. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa waan ku raacsanahay iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: During a practice conversation, Hassan said, “Sorry for being late.” while correcting a common social-English mistake.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, Aamina waxay tiri “Sorry for being late.” si ay u muujiso “waan ka xumahay daahitaanka”, qofkii kalena si ku habboon ayuu uga jawaabay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: correction. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa waan ka xumahay daahitaanka iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I apologized to the customer for sending the wrong document.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waxaan macmiilka uga raalli-geliyay inaan u diray dukumentigii khaldan.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: correction. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa qof raalli-gelin ka sii iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: In the fictional role-play, Hodan said, “Thanks for helping me.” while correcting a common social-English mistake.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, Aamina waxay tiri “Thanks for helping me.” si ay u muujiso “waad ku mahadsan tahay caawinta”, qofkii kalena si ku habboon ayuu uga jawaabay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: correction. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa waad ku mahadsan tahay caawinta iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, Aamina waxay tiri “Could you help me?” si ay u muujiso “ma i caawin kartaa?”, qofkii kalena si ku habboon ayuu uga jawaabay.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: correction. Tone: polite. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa ma i caawin kartaa? iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

grammar.titleEnglish: Common Social-English Mistakes: language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Khaladaadka caadiga ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Use the correct verb patterns and collocations: agree without be, apologize to a person, thank for verb-ing, tell a person, and explain something to a person. Sharaxaaddani waxay ku ekaanaysaa A2, waxayna muujinaysaa communication function-ka, response-ka iyo tone-ka.
grammar.rule: Use the correct verb patterns and collocations: agree without be, apologize to a person, thank for verb-ing, tell a person, and explain something to a person.

negativeExamples.english: Do not choose a private question when safe small talk is more appropriate.

negativeExamples.english: The speaker did not use an informal phrase with an unknown customer.
negativeExamples.somali: Qofkii hadlayay uma adeegsan qof macmiil aan la aqoon weedh aan rasmi ahayn.

questionExamples.english: Could you tell me which response is most appropriate here?
questionExamples.somali: Ma ii sheegi kartaa jawaabta halkan ugu habboon?

questionExamples.english: Do you know whether this phrase is formal or informal?
questionExamples.somali: Ma ogtahay in weedhani rasmi tahay ama aan rasmi ahayn?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku darin qaababka verb-ka iyo preposition-ka.
Ha dooran response wanaagsan ama xun adigoon context-ka eegin.
Advice waa uncountable; ha oran an advice.
Tell qof ayuu qaataa; explain-na waxaa la yiraahdaa explain something to someone.

lines.speaker: Amina
lines.english: I agree.
lines.somali: Aamina waxay adeegsatay: I agree..

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.english: I understand. Could you tell me a little more?
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Wax yar oo dheeraad ah ma ii sheegi kartaa?

lines.speaker: Amina
lines.english: Apologize to
lines.somali: Aamina waxay adeegsatay: Apologize to.

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.english: I understand. Could you tell me a little more?

lines.speaker: Amina
lines.english: Could you help me?

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.english: Thank you. That response is clear and appropriate.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Jawaabtaasi waa cad oo ku habboon.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan correcting a common social-English mistake. Adeegso ugu yaraan afar phrase, muuji tone-ka, oo bixi response ku habboon. Xogta oo dhan ha noqoto mala-awaal.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin ama wada-hadal gaaban oo ku saabsan correcting a common social-English mistake. Ku dar opening, communication function, detail iyo closing ku habboon.
lessons.summarySomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah: waxaad baratay phrases-ka, qaabka correct verb + required object/preposition/form, tone-ka iyo sida response dabiici ah loogu doorto context cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 11 waxaa lagu sharxayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo context, tone iyo jawaab dabiici ah.
learningObjectives: Faham phrases-ka iyo communication function-ka Unit Review.
Kala saar formal, neutral iyo informal marka ay khuseyso.
Dooro response keliya oo context-ka ugu habboon.
Samee speaking iyo writing practice adigoon bixin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The trainer explained “Greeting review” while reviewing all Unit 11 communication functions, then showed its natural collocation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Greeting review”, oo macnihiisu yahay “dib-u-eegista salaamaha”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: review. Tone: neutral. Weedhan waxaa loo adeegsadaa dib-u-eegista salaamaha iyadoo la eegayo qofka iyo xaaladda.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Dooro tone-ka ku habboon, isticmaal collocation-ka saxda ah, kana jawaab si waafaqsan context-ka.

grammar.titleEnglish: Unit Review: language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Dib-u-eegista Unit 11
grammar.explanationSomali: Review greetings, requests, permission, offers, thanks, apologies, invitations, advice, disagreement, messages, tone, and common corrections. Sharaxaaddani waxay ku ekaanaysaa A2, waxayna muujinaysaa communication function-ka, response-ka iyo tone-ka.
grammar.rule: Review greetings, requests, permission, offers, thanks, apologies, invitations, advice, disagreement, messages, tone, and common corrections.

negativeExamples.english: Do not choose a private question when safe small talk is more appropriate.
negativeExamples.somali: Ha dooran su’aal gaar ah marka wada-hadal ammaan ahi ku habboon yahay.

negativeExamples.english: The speaker did not use an informal phrase with an unknown customer.
negativeExamples.somali: Qofkii hadlayay uma adeegsan qof macmiil aan la aqoon weedh aan rasmi ahayn.

questionExamples.english: Could you tell me which response is most appropriate here?
questionExamples.somali: Ma ii sheegi kartaa jawaabta halkan ugu habboon?

questionExamples.english: Do you know whether this phrase is formal or informal?
questionExamples.somali: Ma ogtahay in weedhani rasmi tahay ama aan rasmi ahayn?

commonMistakesSomali: Ha isku darin qaababka verb-ka iyo preposition-ka.
Ha dooran response wanaagsan ama xun adigoon context-ka eegin.
Advice waa uncountable; ha oran an advice.
Tell qof ayuu qaataa; explain-na waxaa la yiraahdaa explain something to someone.

examples.english: Hodan recorded “Clarification review” in her notes while reviewing all Unit 11 communication functions and used it correctly.
examples.somali: Intii lagu jiray tababbarka, ardaydu waxay barteen “Clarification review”, oo macnihiisu yahay “dib-u-eegista caddaynta”, kadibna waxay ku adeegsadeen context cad.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan reviewing all Unit 11 communication functions. Adeegso ugu yaraan afar phrase, muuji tone-ka, oo bixi response ku habboon. Xogta oo dhan ha noqoto mala-awaal.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin ama wada-hadal gaaban oo ku saabsan reviewing all Unit 11 communication functions. Ku dar opening, communication function, detail iyo closing ku habboon.
lessons.summarySomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 11: waxaad baratay phrases-ka, qaabka context + suitable communication function + response, tone-ka iyo sida response dabiici ah loogu doorto context cad.
